app.name: DDNS Agent
app.subtitle: Dynamic DNS Management
overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Monitor your DNS records in real-time.
hostnames.title: Hostnames
hostnames.subtitle: Manage your DNS hostname configurations.
hostnames.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this record?
hostnames.secret_unchanged_hint: Leave blank to keep saved credentials. Enter a new value only if you want to change it.
logs.title: Event Log
logs.subtitle: Real-time stream of DNS updates and system events.
logs.clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all logs?
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure system behavior, refresh intervals, and integrations.
settings.refresh_help: How often to check for IP changes
settings.app_timezone_help: Used for timestamps in /data/logs/agent.log and daily log rotation. IANA name (see tz database). Leave empty to use DDNS_TIMEZONE, TZ, or the server default.
settings.cooldown_help: Minimum time between successful updates for the same hostname (skips redundant API calls when the IP is unchanged).
settings.http_timeout_help: Timeout for requests to IP check services and DNS provider APIs.
settings.backup_retention_help: How many automatic database backups to keep under /data/backups/ (oldest removed when exceeded).
settings.log_archive_retention_help: Days to keep rotated log files (agent-YYYY-MM-DD.log) under /data/logs/.
settings.webhooks_desc: Get notified about IP changes and errors via external services.
settings.import_modal_body:
Settings from the file are merged by key: each key in the JSON overwrites the same setting in the application.

Existing webhooks are kept; webhooks from the file are added in addition.

For hostname records, choose an action below:
settings.import_replace: Remove all current hostnames and import from file
settings.import_merge: Add hostnames from file (skip duplicates: same provider, domain, owner)
settings.export_secrets_note: Provider credentials in the JSON are stored the same way as in the database: if encryption is enabled, they appear as encrypted strings—not plaintext. Re-import on the same instance keeps them working; a new server with a new encryption key requires re-entering credentials.
settings.danger_desc: Irreversible actions that affect your data.
users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Manage access to the DDNS Agent panel.
users.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
notify.session_expired: Session expired, please sign in again
notify.password_default: You are using the default password. Please change it in Settings > Users.
